title: Steal the Patch Size: Adversarially Manipulate Vision-Language Models
summary: We present a black-box model-stealing attack that recovers private vision-tokenizer configurations of deployed vision-language models (VLMs), including the visual patch size and input preprocessing pipeline. The key idea is a task-level side channel induced by ViT-style patchification: when a synthetic grid image is aligned with the hidden patch grid, boundary cues are erased at tokenization, causing periodic accuracy drop. By sweeping the grid cell size and measuring these collapses, we infer the patch size; by introducing padding and a consistency-check test, we further identify whether preprocessing is dynamic- or fixed-resolution and recover the target resize resolution. Across open-source Qwen-VL variants and proprietary models including GPT and Claude, we reliably recover tokenizer-related parameters. Finally, we show that such leakage enables preprocessing-aware transfer attacks and model-targeted adversarial manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种黑盒模型窃取攻击方法，通过ViT风格的分块处理产生的任务级侧信道，利用合成网格图像与隐藏分块网格对齐时引发的周期性精度下降，成功恢复部署中的视觉语言模型的视觉分词器配置（包括视觉块大小和预处理流程），并在包括GPT和Claude在内的闭源模型上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对视觉语言模型（VLM）的模型窃取攻击主要关注模型权重或输出信息的提取，而对其视觉分词器的关键配置参数（如视觉块大小和输入预处理流程）的泄露风险尚未被充分探索，这些参数对于下游攻击（如迁移攻击和对抗性操纵）至关重要。
AI.method: 该方法利用ViT风格分块化引入的任务级侧信道：当合成网格图像的网格尺寸与视觉分块网格对齐时，边界线索在分词化过程中被消除，导致模型精度周期性下降；通过扫描网格单元大小并测量这些精度崩塌点来推断块大小；进一步通过引入填充和一致性检查测试，区分预处理是动态分辨率还是固定分辨率，并恢复目标缩放分辨率。
AI.result: 在包括开源Qwen-VL系列以及闭源模型GPT和Claude在内的多个VLM上，该方法能够可靠地恢复视觉分词器相关的参数；实验结果表明，该泄漏信息能够实现预处理感知的迁移攻击和模型目标的对抗性操纵。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了视觉语言模型在部署过程中存在视觉分词器配置的黑盒泄露风险，表明即使仅通过黑盒访问也能提取关键预处理参数，进而增强下游攻击的有效性，对VLM的安全性评估提出了新的挑战。

title: VOCA: Visual Odometry with Codec Awareness
summary: Camera pose estimation from image streams is a critical component of spatial world models that integrate perception into planning and decision-making. Nearly all Visual Odometry (VO) and Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (V-SLAM) systems have focused on datasets containing raw, uncompressed videos. Many working systems instead use ubiquitous hardware units to efficiently compress and decode video streams, saving orders of magnitude in storage and bandwidth. However, this lossy compression introduces visual artifacts that hinder the performance of traditional tracking systems. We present VOCA, a causal stereo visual-odometry method that exploits codec information to improve tracking performance. We achieve state-of-the-art performance on causal VO for relative trajectory error, efficiency, and absolute trajectory error on compressed streams. This work highlights the potential of leveraging widely available video codec information for vision tasks.

AI.tldr: VOCA提出了一种因果立体视觉里程计方法，利用视频编解码器中的编码信息来提升在压缩视频流上的跟踪性能，在相对轨迹误差、绝对轨迹误差和效率上达到当前最优，展示了利用广泛可用的视频编解码信息辅助视觉任务的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉里程计（VO）和视觉SLAM系统主要针对原始未压缩视频设计，但实际系统中广泛使用有损压缩来节省存储和带宽，而压缩引入的视觉伪影会严重损害传统跟踪方法的性能，这一问题尚未被有效解决。
AI.method: VOCA提出了一种因果立体视觉里程计方法，通过显式利用视频编解码器中的编码信息（如运动矢量和压缩残差）来增强对压缩流中视觉伪影的鲁棒性，从而提升跟踪精度和效率。
AI.result: 在压缩视频流上，VOCA在因果视觉里程计的相对轨迹误差、绝对轨迹误差和效率三个指标上均取得了当前最优性能，显著优于现有的传统跟踪方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了充分利用广泛可用的视频编解码信息来提升视觉任务性能的巨大潜力，为在资源受限或使用压缩视频的实际系统中部署高精度视觉里程计提供了可行方向。

title: EgoSafetyBench: A Diagnostic Egocentric Video Benchmark for Evaluating Embodied VLMs as Runtime Safety Guards
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are now proposed as runtime safety guards for embodied agents in homes and factories. A deployable guard must catch genuinely unsafe situations while avoiding unnecessary intervention on routine but superficially alarming activity, a distinction that binary safety benchmarks obscure. We introduce EgoSafetyBench, an egocentric video benchmark of 1,200 robot-view scenarios annotated at half-second granularity, to evaluate VLMs as streaming guards across two tracks. The situational track (800 scenarios) spans four families, from routine and safe-but-suspicious scenes to obvious and contextual hazards. The visual-channel track (400 scenarios) targets in-scene text-a sign, sticker, or label visible in the scene-that can misrepresent the physical situation, pairing each misleading sign with a truthful version to test both whether a guard flags the text as misleading and whether the text corrupts its physical-safety judgment. Both tracks use contrastive ladders: near-identical scenarios differing only in a single visible deciding cue, so a correct call must hinge on that cue rather than the overall scene type. We evaluate ten open- and closed-source VLMs. We find that while guards reliably recognize videos containing hazards, they often miss specific hazardous moments, particularly contextual hazards. Furthermore, misleading in-scene signs degrade all tested guards: vulnerable models miss up to a third of hazards, while robust models over-intervene on safe content. Matched controls reveal that apparent safety robustness often reflects indiscriminate alarming rather than true physical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出EgoSafetyBench，一个细粒度、对比式的第一人称视频安全基准，用于评估VLM在具身智能体安全防护中的表现，发现VLM在时序定位、情境性危险和场景文字误导方面存在显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有二进制安全基准无法区分真正危险与表面令人担忧但常规的操作场景，且缺乏对场景内文本信息误导性的系统评估，因此需要更精细、具对比性的基准来测试VLM作为流式安全防护器的能力。
AI.method: 构建EgoSafetyBench，包含1,200个机器人视角视频场景，以0.5秒粒度标注；设情境轨道（800场景，覆盖常规/可疑/明显危险/情境性危险四类）和视觉通道轨道（400场景，配对误导性与真实场景内文本）；两类轨道均采用对比阶梯设计，场景间仅单个可见决策线索不同。
AI.result: VLM能可靠识别含危险的视频，但常错过具体危险时刻，尤其对情境性危险；误导性场景内文本使所有测试VLM性能下降，脆弱模型漏检达三分之一危险，鲁棒模型则过度干预安全内容；配对对照实验显示，表面安全鲁棒性常来自无差别警报而非真实物理推理。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLM在具身安全防护中缺乏精确的时间定位能力和鲁棒的物理推理能力，易受场景内文本误导，提示当前安全防护方案需要更强的细粒度推理和抗干扰机制。

title: Multi-Hypothesis Test-Time Adaptation to Mitigate Underspecification
comment: 26 pages, 4 figures, 12 tables, Accepted in ECCV'26
summary: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) seeks to improve model robustness under distribution shifts by adapting parameters using unlabeled target data. However, in the absence of supervision, entropy-based adaptation is fundamentally underconstrained: multiple distinct parameter updates can achieve similarly low entropy while inducing drastically different decision boundaries. This phenomenon, known as underspecification, renders standard TTA brittle and prone to collapse into spurious modes. In this work, we reinterpret TTA through a posterior-inspired lens induced by entropy minimization, where low-entropy solutions define a pseudo-likelihood over parameters. Instead of committing to a single point estimate, we introduce a particle-based diversification framework that explores multiple plausible adaptation trajectories simultaneously. Our method can be viewed as a structured exploration of multiple plausible adaptation solutions, implemented through multi-level diversification at the output, parameter, optimizer, and input levels. Crucially, the framework acts as a plug-and-play wrapper compatible with existing TTA methods. Extensive experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in stability and robustness, achieving improvements of 3-4% under mixed shifts, 2-3% with batch size one, and 1-2.5% under label shifts, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Our results suggest that treating TTA as a multi-hypothesis inference problem, rather than a single-point optimization task, is key to mitigating underspecification and enabling reliable real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于粒子的多样化框架，将测试时自适应（TTA）重新理解为多假设推理问题，通过在输出、参数、优化器和输入四个层面引入结构化探索，有效缓解熵最小化导致的欠定问题，在多种分布偏移场景下显著提升了鲁棒性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 标准测试时自适应（TTA）依赖无监督目标数据通过熵最小化更新模型参数，但熵约束本质上是欠定的：多个不同的参数更新可以产生相近的低熵输出，却对应截然不同的决策边界。这种欠定（underspecification）问题导致TTA方法脆弱，容易陷入虚假模式，限制了其在真实分布偏移场景下的可靠部署。
AI.method: 本文将TTA重新解读为一种后验启发式框架，将低熵解视为参数上的伪似然，并提出一个基于粒子的多样化框架，同时探索多条合理的自适应轨迹。该方法在四个层面实现结构化多样性探索：输出级别、参数级别、优化器级别和输入级别，并作为即插即用的增强模块兼容现有TTA方法。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性基准测试上，该方法在混合分布偏移下提升3-4%，批大小为1时提升2-3%，标签偏移下提升1-2.5%，一致优于当前最先进的基线方法，展现了显著的稳定性和鲁棒性提升。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将TTA视为多假设推理问题而非单点优化任务是缓解欠定问题的关键，这一视角转换能够有效提升模型在真实世界部署中的可靠性。

title: Identifying and Resolving Pitfalls of Knowledge-Based VQA Benchmarks: Auditing, Repairing, and Augmenting
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. The datasets and code are available in https://github.com/VAN-QIAN/ECCV26-ARA
summary: Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) aims to evaluate whether Visual Language Models (VLMs) can retrieve, ground, and reason over external structured knowledge beyond visual evidence. In practice, answer accuracy is widely adopted as the primary evaluation metric, implicitly treating correctness as a proxy for knowledge-grounded reasoning. However, for existing KB-VQA benchmarks, this proxy relies on critical assumptions that are often overlooked and rendered unreliable by benchmark issues: annotated answer must be derivable from the associated knowledge base, question must be well-posed with sufficient constraints, and visual setting must meaningfully require grounded disambiguation. In this work, we show that these assumptions are systematically violated in existing KB-VQA benchmarks. Our audit reveals substantial instances with missing or contradicted answers and underspecified questions that render accuracy a misleading metric. Furthermore, we find that existing datasets rely on visually trivial, single-entity scenes that bypass the need for sophisticated visual-to-knowledge mapping. We demonstrate that even with controlled architectures, these flaws lead to distorted model rankings and overestimations of reasoning capabilities. To address this, we introduce (1) a principled audit-and-repair protocol that restores answer derivability and question clarity, and (2) a controlled multi-entity augmentation protocol that introduces visual ambiguity to challenge initial retrieval and grounded reasoning. Re-evaluation under corrected and augmented settings yields markedly different performance trends. Our findings call for rethinking evaluation protocols and designing more interaction-aware KB-VQA benchmarks that prioritize verifiable reasoning over simple matching.

AI.tldr: 本文系统揭示了现有KB-VQA基准中答案可推导性、问题约束性和视觉歧义性三类假设的系统性违背，导致准确率成为误导性指标并高估了VLM的推理能力；为此提出了审计-修复协议和多实体增强协议，纠正后的评估结果显著改变了模型性能排名。
AI.motivation: 现有KB-VQA基准广泛采用答案准确率作为评估指标，但该指标隐式依赖于三个关键假设——答案必须可从知识库推导、问题必须充分约束、视觉场景必须有意义地要求消歧——这些假设在现有基准中系统性地被违反，导致准确率成为不可靠的评估代理，并可能扭曲模型排名和高估VLM的知识推理能力。
AI.method: 本文首先对现有KB-VQA基准进行系统性审计，识别答案缺失/矛盾、问题约束不足和视觉场景单一等缺陷；随后提出审计-修复协议，恢复答案的可推导性和问题的清晰性；并提出受控多实体增强协议，引入视觉歧义以挑战初始检索和基于知识的推理能力，从而构建更可靠的评估设置。
AI.result: 审计发现现有基准中存在大量答案缺失、答案矛盾以及问题约束不足的实例；视觉场景多为单一实体的简单场景，无需复杂的视觉-知识映射；基于修复和增强后的评估设置，模型性能趋势与原始评估结果存在显著差异，验证了原始准确率指标对模型推理能力的过高估计。
AI.conclusion: 本研究呼吁重新审视KB-VQA的评估协议，推动设计更注重交互感知、可验证推理而非简单匹配的基准，以准确衡量VLM对结构化外部知识的检索、定位和推理能力。

title: Solution space path planning for supporting en-route air traffic control
summary: As technology advances, many path-planning algorithms have been proposed for Air Traffic Management, yet their operational adoption in tactical control remains limited, revealing a misalignment between algorithmic design priorities and air traffic controllers' needs. This underscores the need for decision-support solutions that are inherently interpretable, computationally efficient, and explicitly designed for human use. Focusing on this design challenge, this study develops a conflict-free path-planning algorithm for en-route Air Traffic Control (ATC) designed to be compatible with two guiding considerations: (1) the interpretability and flexibility offered by solution-space displays, which motivate constructing an algorithm that exposes all feasible safe actions and accommodates shifting optimization goals; and (2) the decision logic controllers naturally apply when enforcing operational constraints, such as separation standards, maneuverability limits, waypoint minimization, and routing practicality. Centered on these principles, the algorithm integrates three intent-based conflict detection methods -- distance-based, time-interval-based, and zone-based -- within a solution-space framework to identify conflict-free paths in computationally efficient ways. Additionally, vertex-based and edge-based search nodes are proposed for solution space path planning (SSPP), resulting in two variants -- SSPPV and SSPPE, respectively, which are evaluated in terms of computational speed and solution quality. Empirical results show that SSPPV paired with zone-based conflict detection achieves the best performance, computing paths in 3.69 ms on average in operational-relevant scenarios based on the Delta sector of the Maastricht Upper Area Control Centre (MUAC) using a 5 nmi grid.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向空中交通管制的可解释、高效的无冲突路径规划算法，将三种基于意图的冲突检测方法融入解空间框架，并结合顶点/边搜索节点变体，在MUAC Delta扇区实验中以3.69 ms的平均计算时间实现了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有路径规划算法与空中交通管制员的实际需求之间存在错位，算法设计优先考虑的性能指标缺乏可解释性和灵活性，导致在战术管制中难以被采纳。研究旨在开发一种本质上可解释、计算高效且专为人类使用的决策支持算法。
AI.method: 提出无冲突路径规划算法，基于解空间显示的可解释性与灵活性，集成三种基于意图的冲突检测方法（基于距离、基于时间间隔、基于区域），并提出顶点搜索节点（SSPPV）和边搜索节点（SSPPE）两种解空间路径规划变体，在5 nmi网格上实现冲突识别与路径搜索。
AI.result: 基于荷兰马斯特里赫特高空区域管制中心Delta扇区的运行相关场景实验表明，SSPPV结合基于区域的冲突检测方法性能最优，平均路径计算时间为3.69 ms。
AI.conclusion: 将可解释性、计算效率与管制员决策逻辑融入算法设计是推动路径规划算法实际采纳的关键，SSPPV与区域冲突检测的组合在速度和解质量上均具有最佳表现，为空中交通管制决策支持系统提供了有效解决方案。

title: Rosetta: Composable Native Multimodal Pretraining
summary: Achieving true artificial general intelligence requires foundation models capable of integrating new modalities without forgetting prior knowledge. However, accommodating continuous generative objectives alongside discrete understanding tasks causes severe gradient conflicts. Existing architectures, including standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), are highly susceptible to representation overwriting. Even structurally partitioned paradigms like Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) remain vulnerable to catastrophic forgetting, severely impeding multimodal scalability. In this work, we introduce Rosetta, a composable native multimodal pretraining framework designed for seamless and non-destructive modality expansion. Rosetta adopts a modular paradigm where core foundational knowledge is preserved within global shared experts, while modality-specific capabilities are distributed across plug-and-play experts. To guarantee non-destructive composition, we propose Momentum-Anchored Orthogonal Projection (MAOP). MAOP leverages the optimizer's momentum state as an implicit semantic anchor, selectively neutralizing conflicting gradient components from new modalities while preserving synergistic updates. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that, while standard MoE and MoT architectures suffer catastrophic forgetting of previously acquired knowledge, Rosetta robustly preserves established language and visual understanding. Furthermore, it delivers superior image generation and unlocks cross-modal synergy, paving the way for truly composable and unified multimodal foundation models. To facilitate further multimodal research, we release our code and checkpoints to the community. Project page at https://rosetta-lmm.github.io/.

AI.tldr: Rosetta 提出了一种可组合的原生多模态预训练框架，通过动量锚定正交投影（MAOP）机制解决新模态引入时的灾难性遗忘问题，在保留已有语言和视觉理解能力的同时实现图像生成与跨模态协同。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在扩展新模态时面临严重的梯度冲突，标准 Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）和 Mixture-of-Transformers（MoT）等架构均容易发生表示覆写和灾难性遗忘，阻碍了多模态可扩展性的实现。
AI.method: Rosetta 采用模块化范式，通过全局共享专家保留核心基础知识，而模态特定能力分布到即插即用的专家模块中；同时提出动量锚定正交投影（MAOP），利用优化器的动量状态作为隐式语义锚点，选择性中和新模态中的冲突梯度分量并保留协同更新，从而实现无损组合。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，标准 MoE 和 MoT 架构在扩展新模态时会出现严重的灾难性遗忘，而 Rosetta 能够稳健地保留已建立的语言和视觉理解能力，同时实现更优的图像生成性能并解锁跨模态协同能力。
AI.conclusion: Rosetta 证明了通过模块化设计与梯度冲突消解机制可以实现无损的模态扩展，为构建真正可组合且统一的多模态基础模型提供了可行的技术路径，并将代码和检查点开源以促进社区研究。

title: Structural Pattern Mining in Inka Khipus: Unsupervised Clustering, Provenance Classification, and a Computational Validation of the Santa Valley Match
summary: Khipus--knotted cord devices--were the primary recording medium of the Inka Empire (c. 1400-1532 CE), yet their system remains undeciphered. We present a reproducible machine-learning pipeline applied to the Open Khipu Repository (OKR), a public database of 619 khipus comprising 54,403 cords and 110,677 knots. We engineer 27 structural features per khipu and apply (i) unsupervised clustering via UMAP and HDBSCAN, recovering three structurally distinct groups (silhouette = 0.769); (ii) supervised provenance classification via gradient boosting, reaching F1 = 0.86 for the Inka Late Horizon imperial style; and (iii) SHAP-based interpretability, which identifies cord twist direction as the dominant structural discriminator of imperial khipus. We further report two findings of methodological interest. First, one cluster is dominated not by a geographic region but by nineteenth-century European museum collections, indicating that colonial acquisition and recording practices are structurally encoded in the corpus. Second, we provide an independent computational verification of the recto/verso (moiety) structure of the six Santa Valley khipus reported by Medrano and Urton (2018), reproducing both the aggregate attachment ratio and the identification of the single mixed specimen--using only the public OKR database, without physical access to the objects. We additionally report a negative result: knot-type sequence order, encoded as n-grams, adds no provenance signal beyond aggregate features. All code and data are openly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个可复现的机器学习流程，对Open Khipu Repository中619件Inka奇普的54,403根绳线和110,677个绳结进行结构分析，通过无监督聚类、有监督分类和SHAP可解释性分析，揭示了奇普的结构分组模式，并验证了前人关于Santa Valley奇普的recto/verso结构假设。
AI.motivation: Inka帝国的奇普（khipus）作为主要的记录媒介，其编码系统至今未被破译，现有研究缺乏大规模、可复现的计算分析方法来揭示奇普的结构规律和地域特征。
AI.method: 论文构建了一个可复现的机器学习流程：从OKR数据库中提取27个结构特征，应用UMAP和HDBSCAN进行无监督聚类，使用梯度提升进行有监督的产地分类，并利用SHAP进行特征可解释性分析；此外还引入n-gram分析绳结类型序列。
AI.result: 无监督聚类识别出三个结构不同的分组（轮廓系数0.769）；监督分类对Inka帝国晚期风格的奇普达到F1=0.86；SHAP分析表明绳线扭转方向是区分帝国风格奇普的主导结构特征；一个聚类主要对应19世纪欧洲博物馆收藏而非地理区域；独立计算验证了Santa Valley六件奇普的recto/verso结构；n-gram绳结序列未提供超越聚合特征的产地信号。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明机器学习可以有效揭示奇普的结构模式，并发现了殖民时期博物馆收藏实践在奇普结构上的编码痕迹；同时提供了一个重要的负面结果——绳结序列的n-gram特征对产地分类无额外贡献，为奇普破译研究提供了方法论参考。

title: From Signals to Structure: How Memory Architecture Drives Language Emergence in LLM Agents
summary: How do two agents invent a shared language from scratch? In a Lewis signaling game, a sender and receiver must coordinate on a code using only their interaction history. We study five memory architectures across varying channel configurations with LLM agents and find that memory architecture matters more than channel capacity. Agents with a persistent private notebook benefit from surplus channel capacity and avoid the high-capacity collapse seen in stateless agents, achieving the most reliable coordination ($0.867 \pm 0.023$ at capacity = 25). Stateless agents peak at moderate capacity and then degrade as the vocabulary grows beyond what a rolling context window can track The notebook externalizes learned conventions, freeing agents from having to re-derive codes each round. An information bottleneck-inspired argument predicts an optimal capacity equal to the number of objects. Instead, the bottleneck (capacity = 8) proves to be a fragility point, and surplus capacity is generally better. We show that channel capacity alone cannot predict coordination; memory architecture determines whether agents turn interaction history into stable conventions, and both dimensions are needed to understand how signals become language.

AI.tldr: 通过比较五种记忆架构在刘易斯信号博弈中的表现，本文发现记忆架构比信道容量对涌现语言协调的可靠性影响更大，其中带有持久私人笔记本的智能体取得了最高的协调成功率（0.867 ± 0.023），而信息瓶颈处的信道容量反而成为脆弱点。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注信道容量对语言涌现的影响，但忽略了智能体记忆架构在将交互历史转化为稳定代码中的关键作用，本文旨在系统比较不同记忆架构与大语言模型智能体在刘易斯信号博弈中的协调能力。
AI.method: 在刘易斯信号博弈框架下，使用大语言模型智能体分别作为发送者和接收者，设计了五种记忆架构（包括无状态、滚动窗口、持久私人笔记本等），在多种信道容量配置下进行实验，并引入信息瓶颈视角分析最优信道容量与协调成功率的关系。
AI.result: 带有持久私人笔记本的智能体在信道容量为25时达到最高协调成功率（0.867 ± 0.023），并能有效利用剩余信道容量避免崩溃；无状态智能体在中等容量时表现最佳，而后随词汇量增长而退化；信息瓶颈预测的最优容量（容量=8）反而成为脆弱点，剩余容量通常更优。
AI.conclusion: 信道容量本身无法预测协调效果，记忆架构决定了智能体能否将交互历史转化为稳定的语言约定；理解信号如何演变为语言需要同时考虑信道容量和记忆架构两个维度。

title: RetailSMV: Exocentric vs. Egocentric Adaptation of Foundation Video World Models in Retail
summary:
Foundation video diffusion models are increasingly viewed as world simulators for embodied agents, yet their pretraining on internet-scale generic video leaves them poorly aligned with real-world deployment domains. We study parameter-efficient adaptation of a pretrained foundation video world model to retail scenes: when synchronized egocentric and exocentric video of the same activity are available, which viewpoint of training data produces the strongest adapted model?
  We introduce RetailSMV (Retail Synchronized Multi-View), a corpus of 32,105 captioned retail clips from five supermarkets with synchronized ego/exo capture from the store-staff perspective (stocking, arranging, weighing, managing supply carts, scanning at checkout), rather than the customer-centric framing of prior retail video corpora, and train three matched Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) configurations of Cosmos3-Nano (egocentric-only, exocentric-only, combined) under identical hyperparameters. On a 200-clip held-out test set evaluated with seven complementary metrics under a strict paired statistical protocol, exocentric-only adaptation matches or exceeds combined adaptation on six of seven point estimates and is significantly better on LPIPS, PSNR, and DreamSim, despite training on only 15,985 exocentric clips (versus 32,105 for combined). A symmetric paired comparison further shows that adding exocentric data to egocentric-only training helps while adding egocentric data to exocentric-only training hurts. The absolute adaptation gap is largest at the shortest rollout time, identifying the near-horizon prediction window as the regime in which adaptation is most beneficial.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将预训练的基础视频世界模型通过参数高效微调适配到零售场景的最佳视角数据策略，发现仅使用外视频（exocentric）微调在多数指标上优于或持平于联合视角微调，且融合外视频数据有助于提升自我中心视角模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 基础视频扩散模型虽被视为具身智能体的世界模拟器，但其在海量互联网通用视频上的预训练与真实世界部署领域（如零售场景）之间存在显著分布偏移。现有零售视频数据集多以顾客为中心视角采集，缺乏从店员视角出发、同步包含自我中心（egocentric）和外中心（exocentric）视角的多模态数据，导致模型在具体场景下的视频预测能力不佳。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含32,105条带字幕的零售视频片段的多视角数据集RetailSMV，从五个超市采集店员视角（补货、整理、称重、推车、扫码）的同步自我中心和外中心视频；基于Cosmos3-Nano基础模型，在相同超参数下训练了三组低秩适配（LoRA）配置（仅自我中心、仅外中心、联合训练），并在200条测试集上使用七种互补指标和严格配对统计协议进行评估。
AI.result: 仅使用15,985条外中心视频的LoRA适配在七项指标中的六项点估计上达到或优于联合使用32,105条视频的训练效果，且在LPIPS、PSNR和DreamSim指标上显著更优。对称配对比较表明，向外中心模型添加自我中心数据会损害性能，而向自我中心模型添加外中心数据则有助于提升性能；适配带来的绝对增益在最短 rollout 时间步上最大，表明近地平线预测窗口是适配最有利的区间。
AI.conclusion: 外中心视角数据是适配零售场景视频世界模型的关键视角资源，其信息量足以驱动模型有效适应领域分布，而额外加入自我中心数据反而可能引入冗余或噪声。未来在构建面向具体场景的世界模型时，应优先收集高质量的外中心视频数据；适配策略对短时预测窗口的改善最为显著，提示在实际部署中应重点关注近视野的预测质量。

title: DiscoLoop: Looping Discrete Embeddings and Continuous Hidden States for Multi-hop Reasoning
summary: Large language models achieve strong performance on many reasoning tasks when allowed to externalize intermediate steps as Chain-of-Thought (CoT). However, many questions require the model to internalize the multi-step reasoning within a single forward pass before generating the answer. We study this challenge through two-hop reasoning, a representative task where the model must compose multiple pieces of parametric knowledge within a single forward pass. Standard non-recurrent Transformers suffer from a depth-local storage problem: facts learned in earlier layers are unavailable where second-hop retrieval happens. We found that Looped Transformers mitigate this issue by reusing the same memory, but still generalize imperfectly. We show that the remaining bottleneck is representational. In the two-hop reasoning task, the first loop often makes the correct bridge entity nearly perfectly decodable, yet the corresponding hidden state remains poorly aligned with the bridge token embedding. Surprisingly, an easy training-free realignment intervention nearly closes the generalization gap. Building upon this insight, we propose DiscoLoop, a looping architecture whose recurrence carries both a discrete embedding channel and a continuous hidden-state channel. DiscoLoop achieves near-perfect accuracy with substantially fewer training steps across symbolic and synthetic-language multi-hop reasoning tasks. When applied to real-world pretraining, DiscoLoop attains lower training loss and stronger benchmark performance than looped-transformer baselines, suggesting that the mixed-channel design transfers to practical language modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大型语言模型在单次前向传播中需内化多步推理的挑战，通过分析两跳推理任务中标准Transformer的深度局部存储问题和Looped Transformer的表征瓶颈，提出DiscoLoop架构——在循环中同时传递离散嵌入通道和连续隐藏状态通道，在符号和合成语言的多跳推理任务上实现近乎完美的准确率，并显著提升预训练性能。
AI.motivation: 标准非循环Transformer在单次前向传播中完成多步推理时存在深度局部存储问题：早期层学习到的事实无法被后续用于第二跳检索的层访问；Looped Transformer虽通过重复使用同一记忆缓解该问题，但泛化仍不完美，其根本瓶颈在于表征层面——第一轮循环产生的桥接实体虽几乎可完美解码，但对应的隐藏状态与桥接token嵌入之间对齐不良。
AI.method: 首先发现一种无需训练的简单重对齐干预即可几乎消除泛化差距；基于此洞察提出DiscoLoop循环架构，其循环机制同时传递两条通道：离散嵌入通道（discrete embedding channel）和连续隐藏状态通道（continuous hidden-state channel），从而在循环过程中既保留可解码的离散信息又维持连续的表示能力。
AI.result: DiscoLoop在符号和合成语言的多跳推理任务上以显著更少的训练步数达到近乎完美的准确率；在真实世界预训练场景中，DiscoLoop相比Looped Transformer基线取得更低的训练损失和更强的基准测试性能，表明混合通道设计能够迁移至实际语言建模任务。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明多跳推理中表征对齐是关键瓶颈，通过引入离散与连续混合通道的循环设计可有效克服该问题；DiscoLoop不仅在小规模推理任务上表现优异，其设计理念也能推广至大规模预训练场景，为构建更高效的多步推理语言模型提供了可行方向。

title: Managed Autonomy at Runtime: Gear-Based Safety and Governance for Single- and Multi-Agent Cyber-Physical Systems
comment: to be submitted to a Journal, 18 pages
summary: Autonomous agents, whether LLM-driven software agents or robotic physical agents, face a common class of failure modes when operating without continuous human oversight: safety violations from unverified actions, behavioral instability from unconstrained loops, and continuity loss from unhandled error states. We develop \system{}, a discrete-time control system that combines five execution gears (\Gobs{}, \Gsug{}, \Gplan{}, \Gexec{}, \Gint{}) with utility-gated dispatch and event-driven fallback. For the single-agent case, we prove monotonic stability, execution safety, eventual stabilization, fallback completeness, and equivalence to a gear-constrained Markov decision process. For multi-agent cyber-physical systems (CPS), we apply the established \smart{} managed-autonomy lifecycle and map runtime evidence into its four governance states (\Stable{}/\Meta{}/\Assisted{}/\Regulated{}). Consensus gating, swarm-level Lyapunov analysis, per-agent gear authority, and rendezvous control provide distributed safety and stability guarantees, including zero collision under the stated assumptions. We evaluate the resulting runtime on a three-agent UR5 robotic assembly cell using fault magnitudes calibrated from the NIST \emph{Degradation Measurement of Robot Arm Position Accuracy} dataset across 10,000 Monte Carlo episodes. It achieves a 99.6\% anomaly detection rate versus 2.1\% for the single-agent baseline, reduces detection latency by $3.5\times$, and supplies a formal physical-workspace safety certificate. The execution gears act as micro-level permissions beneath the \smart{} runtime governance states, separating action control from autonomy governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SYSTEM，一个五档离散时间控制系统（Gobs, Gsug, Gplan, Gexec, Gint），结合效用门控调度与事件驱动回退，为单智能体提供形式化稳定性与安全性证明，并扩展至多智能体CPS场景下基于SMART生命周期与Lyapunov分析的分布式安全保障，在三智能体UR5机器人装配任务中实现99.6%异常检测率与3.5倍延迟降低。
AI.motivation: 自主智能体（包括LLM驱动的软件智能体和机器人物理智能体）在缺乏持续人类监督时面临三类共性故障模式：未验证动作引发的安全性违规、无约束循环导致的行为不稳定性、以及未处理错误状态引发的连续性中断。现有方法缺乏统一的、可提供形式化安全与稳定性保障的运行时控制系统。
AI.method: 提出SYSTEM，一种离散时间控制系统，包含五个执行档位（Gobs观测、Gsug建议、Gplan规划、Gexec执行、Gint干预），采用效用门控调度与事件驱动回退机制。单智能体方面证明了单调稳定性、执行安全性、最终稳定化、回退完备性以及与档位约束马尔可夫决策过程的等价性。多智能体CPS场景下，应用SMART受管自主生命周期，将运行时证据映射到其四个治理状态（稳定/元/辅助/调控），并通过共识门控、群体Lyapunov分析、单智能体档位权限和会合控制提供分布式安全与稳定性保证。
AI.result: 在三智能体UR5机器人装配单元上，使用来自NIST机器人手臂位置精度退化测量数据集的校准故障幅度进行10,000次蒙特卡洛实验评估，SYSTEM实现了99.6%的异常检测率（相比单智能体基线的2.1%），检测延迟降低了3.5倍，并提供了形式化的物理工作空间安全证书。
AI.conclusion: 执行档位作为SMART运行时治理状态下的微级权限机制，实现了动作控制与自主治理的分离。该框架为自主智能体系统提供了一种兼具形式化保证与实用性能的运行时安全控制方案，在工业多智能体协作场景中展示了显著优势。

title: DroneFINE: Domain-Aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Vision-Language Detectors for Drone Images
summary: Object detection for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) working in open and dynamic environments is a highly challenging task. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have offered a powerful solution for universal object detection, adapting them to UAV scenarios remains non-trivial due to a substantial domain gap between VLM pre-training data and aerial imagery. The prevailing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods prove ineffective in bridging this gap, as VLMs' "natural-scene, foreground-dominant" visual priors misalign with the "bird's-eye-view, background-dominant, small-object" characteristics of UAV data. To address this issue, we propose DroneFINE, a novel PEFT paradigm comprising two domain-aware complementary modules tailored for VLM-based drone image detectors. Specifically, a data-dependent, foreground-aware, and multi-path adaptation mechanism named HyperAdapter is designed, which overcomes the static structural constraints of PEFT. In addition, a background suppression algorithm named SemanticGate is developed. It is a text-conditioned guidance strategy that employs background vocabulary to actively guide the model in suppressing responses from irrelevant regions. Extensive experiments on VisDrone and UAVDT demonstrate that DroneFINE significantly outperforms existing PEFT methods and achieves performance comparable to full fine-tuning while substantially reducing the number of trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: DroneFINE 提出了一种面向无人机航拍场景的 PEFT 范式，通过领域感知的 HyperAdapter 和文本条件背景抑制模块 SemanticGate，有效弥合 VLM 预训练与无人机图像之间的领域鸿沟，在参数量极少的情况下达到与全微调相当的目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 将视觉语言模型（VLM）应用于无人机（UAV）目标检测时，VLM 预训练数据与航拍图像之间存在显著的领域鸿沟：前者以自然场景和前景主体主导，后者具有鸟瞰视角、背景主导及小目标等特点。现有参数高效微调（PEFT）方法由于静态结构约束，无法有效弥合这一领域差异。
AI.method: 提出 DroneFINE 范式，包含两个领域感知互补模块：一是 HyperAdapter，一种数据依赖、前景感知的多路径自适应机制，克服传统 PEFT 的静态结构限制；二是 SemanticGate，一种文本条件引导策略，通过背景词汇主动引导模型抑制无关区域的响应，实现背景抑制。
AI.result: 在 VisDrone 和 UAVDT 数据集上的大量实验表明，DroneFINE 显著优于现有 PEFT 方法，在大幅减少可训练参数数量的前提下，达到了与全微调相当的目标检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了针对特定领域设计领域感知的 PEFT 模块是弥合 VLM 与下游任务间领域鸿沟的有效途径，为无人机等开放动态环境中的高效目标检测提供了可行的轻量化微调方案。

title: Beyond Perplexity: A Behavioral Evaluation Framework for Deployment-Memory Claims in LLM Test-Time Training
summary: Large language model test-time training (TTT) is often evaluated through local proxy metrics: models are updated on recent tokens, retrieved context, target-domain data, or verifiable task attempts, and then judged by perplexity, future-token loss, long-context performance, or reward. These metrics are well matched to claims about stream adaptation, domain adaptation, context compression, and reward-backed test-time improvement. They are weaker evidence, however, for a capability that TTT results are increasingly used to motivate: deployed assistant memory, personalization, or sparse post-deployment learning, which instead requires behavioral evidence such as later recall, paraphrase robustness, retention, locality, conflict handling, and use in downstream actions after the original support context is removed. We introduce a behavioral evaluation framework that calibrates TTT memory claims to the evidence that supports them. It has two components: a claim-calibrated evidence ladder that separates stream/domain adaptation, bridge internalization, and deployment-time behavioral learning; and an evaluation protocol with matched explicit-memory baselines and mutually exclusive failure categories. We validate the framework by auditing recent TTT and memory-adjacent work and by instantiating it as a controlled diagnostic in which, in a sparse nonce-fact setting, one-step LoRA updates lower support and answer loss across three Qwen3 model scales while generated free-form recall stays at zero, exposing a measurable gap between proxy improvement and deployment behavior. The framework gives authors and evaluators a concrete standard for aligning TTT memory claims with the evidence actually reported.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个行为评估框架来校准大语言模型测试时训练（TTT）的记忆声称，通过证据阶梯和显式记忆基线协议，揭示代理指标（如困惑度）与部署期行为证据（如自由回忆）之间的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型测试时训练（TTT）通常使用局部代理指标（如困惑度、未来token损失）进行评估，这些指标适用于流适应、领域适应等场景，但无法充分支持TTT研究日益声称的部署后助理记忆、个性化或稀疏学习能力，后者需要后期召回、释义鲁棒性、冲突处理等行为证据。
AI.method: 提出一个包含两部分的行为评估框架：一是声称校准的证据阶梯，将证据分为流/领域适应、桥接内化和部署期行为学习三个层级；二是与显式记忆基线匹配且包含互斥失败类别的评估协议。框架通过对近期TTT及记忆相关工作的审计和实例化诊断进行验证，实例中使用稀疏虚构事实设定，对Qwen3三种规模模型执行单步LoRA更新，同时测量支持损失、答案损失和自由形式召回率。
AI.result: 在稀疏虚构事实设定下，单步LoRA更新虽降低了Qwen3模型的支持损失和答案损失，但生成的自由形式召回率始终为零，表明代理指标改善与部署期行为之间存在可测量的显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究者和评估者提供了将TTT记忆声称与实际报告证据对齐的具体标准，强调了行为证据在验证部署期记忆能力中的必要性，并指出了现有代理指标在此类声称中的局限性。

title: Personalization as Inverse Planning: Learning Latent Design Intents for Agentic Slide Generation via Structural Denoising
summary: Slide design requires personalizing both deck themes and page layouts. Yet, current AI agent-based methods struggle with fine-grained, page-level design. Solely relying on prespecified templates or user verbose instructions, they fail to capture latent design intents, leaving Page-level Slide Personalization (PSP) unresolved. To close this gap, this work formulates PSP as an inverse planning problem. We propose to learn a design intent without assuming any knowledge of the specific executing tools (e.g., PowerPoint, Beamer) being used. However, relinquishing control over these tools makes the problem intractable to optimize end-to-end. To overcome this, we propose SPIRE, a principled framework to solve PSP approximately. By intentionally corrupting the visual structures of clean slides, SPIRE creates a verifiable task to denoise the corruption, whereby two agents learn to collaboratively refine executable designs via reinforcement learning (RL). We present a proof that structural denoising is a consistent surrogate for PSP, and that the multi-agent formulation strictly reduces policy gradient variance in RL. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of SPIRE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPIRE框架，将页面级幻灯片个性化（PSP）形式化为逆向规划问题，通过结构性噪声破坏与多智能体强化学习协作，在不依赖具体设计工具的前提下近似求解PSP，理论证明结构去噪是PSP的一致代理且多智能体公式可降低策略梯度方差，实验验证其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体方法依赖预设模板或用户冗长指令，难以捕捉细粒度页面级设计的潜在意图，导致页面级幻灯片个性化（PSP）问题尚未得到有效解决。
AI.method: 本文将PSP形式化为逆向规划问题，提出SPIRE框架近似求解。该方法刻意破坏干净幻灯片的视觉结构以创建可验证的去噪任务，通过两个智能体协作利用强化学习（RL）优化可执行设计方案；理论证明结构去噪是PSP的一致代理，并且多智能体公式能严格降低策略梯度方差。
AI.result: SPIRE在广泛实验中展现出优于现有方法的性能，验证了其有效性；同时理论分析确认结构去噪作为PSP一致代理的合理性以及多智能体RL公式降低策略梯度方差的严格性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过逆向规划视角与多智能体强化学习框架，解决了无需指定工具（如PowerPoint、Beamer）的页面级幻灯片个性化问题，为AI驱动的自动化幻灯片设计提供了新的理论依据和实践路径。

title: Personalized Object Identification and Localization via In-Context Inference with Vision-Language Models
summary: Personalized object localization (POL) localizes an object instance in a query image based on a few reference images with bounding-box annotations and a target object label. The pioneering method, IPLoc, solves this task through in-context inference with vision-language models (VLMs). However, it assumes that the query image always contains the target object. This assumption severely limits its applicability to real-world scenarios with many irrelevant images. To address this issue, we formulate a new task, personalized object identification and localization (POIL), by positioning POL within the broader few-shot object detection framework. POIL aims to localize the target object instance while rejecting query images that do not contain the reference object instance. We also present POIL datasets constructed from public sources. We further propose an in-context algorithm named IPLoc-ID for solving POIL with VLMs. IPLoc-ID first predicts a candidate bounding box and then determines whether it corresponds to the reference object instance. We introduce a self-posed query to connect these two steps within a single autoregressive generation framework. Through ablation studies and comprehensive experiments, we show that IPLoc-ID substantially suppresses false-positive detections on negative query images while maintaining localization performance comparable to IPLoc. Overall, IPLoc-ID effectively addresses the practical instance-level POIL task, which cannot be sufficiently solved by conventional object detection, few-shot object detection, or the localization-only IPLoc method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出个性化目标识别与定位（POIL）任务，将个性化目标定位（POL）扩展至可拒绝无关查询图像，并基于视觉语言模型提出IPLoc-ID方法，通过自提查询机制在单自回归框架中实现目标候选框预测与存在性判别，有效抑制负查询图像上的误检，同时保持与IPLoc相当的定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有POL方法（如IPLoc）假设查询图像始终包含目标对象，这一假设在真实场景中难以成立，因为大量查询图像可能不包含目标对象，导致方法缺乏拒识能力，限制了其实用性。
AI.method: 本文首先将POL置于更广义的小样本目标检测框架中，形式化定义了POIL任务；然后提出IPLoc-ID算法，该算法基于VLM进行上下文推理，先预测一个候选边界框，再通过自提查询（self-posed query）机制将候选框判别与目标存在性判定连接至同一自回归生成框架中，实现端到端处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，IPLoc-ID在负查询图像上显著抑制了误检率，同时保持了与IPLoc相当的定位精度；消融实验验证了各模块的有效性，证明了该方法能够有效解决POIL这一实际任务。
AI.conclusion: IPLoc-ID有效填补了传统目标检测、小样本目标检测及仅定位的IPLoc方法在实例级目标识别与定位任务上的空白，为处理包含无关图像的开放场景提供了可行方案。

title: Selective Test-Time Debiasing for CLIP via Reward Gating
summary: Vision language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong zero-shot performance, but often perpetuate social stereotypes in person-centric queries, yielding skewed demographic distributions. Current debiasing methods apply uniform bias corrections across all input queries regardless of their bias sensitivity, creating a fundamental fairness--utility trade-off. Strong debiasing distorts semantically meaningful information in bias-insensitive queries, while weak debiasing fails to mitigate stereotypes in bias-sensitive ones. This one-size-fits-all approach hampers simultaneously achieving high utility on bias-insensitive queries and fairness on bias-sensitive queries. We introduce Reward-Gated Test-Time Adaptation (RG-TTA), a reinforcement learning-based test-time adaptation framework that selectively applies debiasing based on input sensitivity. RG-TTA adaptively triggers fairness regularization based on the bias sensitivity of each input during test-time policy adaptation, while focusing exclusively on optimizing cross-modal alignment for bias-insensitive inputs. Experiments on fairness benchmarks (e.g., FairFace, UTKFace) demonstrate substantial bias reduction while simultaneously improving zero-shot utility, resolving the trade-off of uniform debiasing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于强化学习的测试时自适应框架RG-TTA，根据输入查询的偏差敏感性选择性触发去偏处理，从而在偏差敏感查询上实现公平性、在偏差不敏感查询上保持高实用性，解决了统一去偏方法在公平性与实用性之间的根本性权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在以人为中心的查询中会延续社会刻板印象，产生有偏的人口分布。当前的去偏方法对所有输入查询采用统一的偏差校正，无论其对偏差的敏感性如何，导致在偏差不敏感查询上扭曲语义信息（低实用性），而在偏差敏感查询上又无法有效缓解刻板印象（低公平性），形成公平性—实用性之间的根本性权衡。
AI.method: 提出Reward-Gated Test-Time Adaptation (RG-TTA)，一个基于强化学习的测试时自适应框架。该框架根据每个输入的偏差敏感性，在测试时策略自适应过程中选择性地触发公平性正则化：对偏差敏感输入进行去偏，对偏差不敏感输入则专注于优化跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在FairFace、UTKFace等公平性基准数据集上的实验表明，RG-TTA在显著降低偏差的同时，提升了零样本实用性，成功地解决了统一去偏方法中公平性与实用性之间的权衡问题。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了输入级偏差敏感性的异质性，并证明按需自适应去偏偏好于统一去偏范式，为在VLM中同时实现公平性与高实用性提供了可行的框架，也为后续将强化学习引入模型公平性适配开辟了新方向。

title: PHREEQC-MCQ-200: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Tool-Augmented Scientific Simulator Agents
summary:
Large language model agents are increasingly connected to scientific software, yet it remains unclear when tool access makes scientific computation more reliable rather than merely more complex. We introduce PHREEQC-MCQ-200, a benchmark for evaluating tool-augmented agents on deterministic aqueous-geochemistry simulations. The benchmark contains 200 multiple-choice questions derived from 21 validated PHREEQC scenarios, requiring agents to construct simulator inputs, execute PHREEQC, inspect structured outputs, and commit to final answers.
  Across multiple frontier and mid-tier model families, simulator access substantially improves aggregate accuracy, confirming that grounded execution is necessary for many scientific-computation tasks. However, the gains are not monotonic: tool-augmented agents also lose items they answered correctly without tools, revealing regressions that average accuracy alone hides. We further show that output-access protocol matters. A table-of-contents interface can reduce token cost while preserving or improving accuracy for stronger models, but it degrades performance for mid-tier models that cannot reliably navigate structured simulator outputs.
  PHREEQC-MCQ-200 therefore frames scientific tool use as an end-to-end diagnostic problem rather than a simple tool-calling capability. We argue that evaluations of scientific agents should report not only accuracy, but also item-level retention, output-access sensitivity, trajectory failures, and where the computation chain breaks.

AI.tldr: 提出PHREEQC-MCQ-200基准测试，用于评估工具增强型LLM智能体在地球化学模拟中的可靠性，发现虽然工具访问能提升整体准确率，但会导致个体层面的回归，且输出访问协议和模型能力对性能有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型智能体越来越多地连接到科学软件，但工具访问何时能使科学计算更可靠而非仅仅更复杂尚不清楚，现有评估缺乏对科学工具使用端到端诊断能力的系统测试。
AI.method: 构建PHREEQC-MCQ-200基准，包含200道来自21个已验证PHREEQC场景的多项选择题，要求智能体构造模拟器输入、执行PHREEQC、检查结构化输出并给出最终答案；同时引入表格式内容导航接口作为输出访问协议变体，对比不同模型家族在有无工具条件下的表现。
AI.result: 模拟器访问显著提升了多个前沿和中端模型族的总体准确率，但增益并非单调——工具增强型智能体在先前无工具回答正确的题目上出现退化；表格式内容导航接口可降低更强模型的令牌成本并保持或提升准确率，但中端模型因无法可靠导航结构化模拟器输出而导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: PHREEQC-MCQ-200将科学工具使用定位为端到端诊断问题而非简单工具调用能力，科学智能体评估应报告准确率、题目层面保留率、输出访问敏感性、轨迹失败以及计算链断裂位置等多项指标。

title: Vitality-Aware Compression for Efficient Image-to-Shape Diffusion Transformers
summary: We propose the first compression approach for image-to-shape Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) that substantially reduces model size while preserving geometric fidelity. Despite remarkable progress in 3D shape generation, large DiT-based models remain computationally prohibitive in resource-constrained settings. Furthermore, it is difficult to directly transfer existing diffusion model compression strategies developed for different domains to 3D generation, and prior 3D efficiency approaches focus primarily on inference speed rather than backbone compression. To address this limitation, we build a geometry-aware compression framework tailored to image-to-shape DiTs. Guided by the observation that 3D DiT layers exhibit non-uniform importance for geometry synthesis, we introduce a vitality-guided framework integrating structured pruning, adaptive quantization, and targeted fine-tuning. Our method achieves up to 66% model-size reduction across state-of-the-art image-to-3D models while maintaining synthesis fidelity comparable to full-sized counterparts. This highlights the potential of our framework as a plug-and-play solution for efficient 3D shape generation across diverse models.

AI.tldr: 提出首个针对图像到三维形状扩散变换器（DiT）的压缩方法，通过活力引导的结构化剪枝、自适应量化和定向微调，在保持几何保真度的同时实现高达66%的模型尺寸缩减。
AI.motivation: 基于DiT的3D生成模型虽性能卓越但计算开销巨大，在资源受限场景下难以部署；现有扩散模型压缩策略主要面向其他领域，难以直接迁移至3D生成任务，而先前3D效率研究多聚焦推理加速而非骨干网络压缩，缺乏针对图像到形状DiT的专门压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出几何感知的压缩框架，基于3D DiT各层对几何合成重要性非均匀的观察，引入活力（vitality）引导机制，整合结构化剪枝（移除不重要层/通道）、自适应量化（按重要性分配不同位宽）和定向微调三个环节，形成端到端的压缩流程。
AI.result: 在多种主流图像到3D模型上实现最高66%的模型尺寸缩减，且合成保真度与完整模型相当，验证了该方法作为即插即用解决方案在不同模型上的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 证明了针对3D DiT的几何感知压缩策略的有效性，为资源受限环境下的高效3D形状生成提供了通用且可迁移的解决方案，未来可推广至更广泛的3D生成模型体系。

title: A Task-State Representation for Long-Horizon Mobile GUI Agents
summary: While long-horizon mobile GUI agents typically rely on thought-action-observation loops, they struggle to separate persistent task states from transient screen observations. As execution histories grow, this entanglement imposes a severe context burden, causing agents to forget initial requirements, hallucinate progress, or repeatedly interact with stale interfaces. To address this, we introduce Task-State Representation (TSR), a training-free framework that explicitly decouples task state from sensory input. Acting as a lightweight external wrapper, TSR maintains three structured components: a global instruction summary, a dynamic progress tracker for subgoals, and a transition-aware action verifier. By continuously updating through pre- and post-action visual comparisons, TSR effectively guides the agent's reasoning without requiring architectural modifications. Experiments across four mobile GUI benchmarks validate TSR's effectiveness, yielding up to a 12 absolute point increase in success rate on complex cross-application and memory-intensive tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出任务状态表征（TSR），一种无需训练的外部框架，通过将任务状态与感官输入显式解耦来缓解长时域移动GUI智能体在推理过程中的上下文负担问题，在跨应用和内存密集型任务中取得显著成功率提升。
AI.motivation: 长时域移动GUI智能体通常依赖“思考-行动-观察”循环，但难以区分持久的任务状态与瞬时的屏幕观测；随着执行历史增长，这种纠缠导致严重上下文负担，使智能体遗忘初始需求、产生进度幻觉或反复与过时界面交互，亟需一种有效的解耦机制。
AI.method: TSR是一种无训练的外部轻量级框架，显式将任务状态与感官输入解耦；它维护三个结构化组件：全局指令摘要、子目标动态进度追踪器、以及具有过渡感知的动作验证器；通过动作前后的视觉比较持续更新TSR，无需修改模型架构即可有效引导智能体推理。
AI.result: 在四个移动GUI基准上的实验验证了TSR的有效性，在复杂跨应用和内存密集型任务中，成功率达到最高12个绝对百分点的提升。
AI.conclusion: TSR通过轻量级、无需训练的外部封装机制有效解决了长时域GUI智能体中的状态-观测纠缠问题，显著提升了复杂任务的执行成功率，为改进移动GUI智能体的长期推理能力提供了实用的即插即用解决方案。

title: Agri-SAGE: Simulation-Grounded Multi-Agent LLM for Context-Aware Agricultural Advisory Generation
summary: Agricultural advisory systems face a fundamental tension: static agronomic guidelines offer consistent, evidence-based recommendations, yet remain blind to in-season variability and dynamic uncertainties. Recent advisory systems powered by LLMs are liable for a different risk of generating recommendations that are agronomically credible but physiologically unconvincing. Agri-SAGE is a closed-loop framework designed to resolve the above two limitations by integrating retrieval-grounded multi-agent LLM reasoning with APSIM-based biophysical simulation, to generate and validate agronomic advisories. To assess this framework, we evaluate three reasoning approaches, namely Plan-and-Solve, Tree of Thoughts, and Reflexion, over a 10-year retrospective analysis. All three significantly outperform static PoP (Package-of-Practice) baselines, with Tree of Thoughts achieving impressive peak yields. At the same time, Reflexion achieves comparable agronomic outcomes at substantially lower computational cost by leveraging cross-seasonal episodic memory.

AI.tldr: Agri-SAGE是一个闭环框架，通过将检索增强的多智能体LLM推理与APSIM生物物理仿真相结合，生成并验证农艺建议，在10年回顾性分析中，Tree of Thoughts实现峰值产量，Reflexion以更低计算成本达到相当效果，三者均显著优于静态Package-of-Practice基线。
AI.motivation: 传统农艺咨询系统存在根本性矛盾：静态指南虽一致且基于证据，但无法感知季节内变化和动态不确定性；而基于LLM的咨询系统可能生成农艺上可信但生理学上不可靠的建议。Agri-SAGE旨在同时解决这两类局限性。
AI.method: Agri-SAGE采用闭环框架，将检索增强的多智能体LLM推理与APSIM生物物理仿真集成，通过Plan-and-Solve、Tree of Thoughts和Reflexion三种推理方法生成并验证农艺建议，其中Reflexion利用跨季节情景记忆来降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在10年回顾性分析中，三种推理方法均显著优于静态Package-of-Practice基线，其中Tree of Thoughts实现了令人印象深刻的峰值产量，而Reflexion通过跨季节情景记忆在显著降低计算成本的同时达到了相当的农艺效果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明检索增强的多智能体LLM推理与生物物理仿真相结合是突破静态指南和纯LLM建议局限性的有效路径，同时揭示了不同推理策略在性能与计算效率之间的权衡，为构建可靠、动态的智能农艺咨询系统提供了方法论基础。

title: DriveVer: Lightweight Trajectory Evaluator as Test-Time Verifier for Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving models often encounter performance bottlenecks, as training-time scaling leads to high computational costs and diminishing marginal returns. Existing planners typically adopt a one-shot generation paradigm, lacking secondary validation and active correction mechanisms to detect and revise suboptimal or unsafe trajectories during inference. To address this issue, we propose DriveVer, a lightweight, plug-and-play Test-Time Verifier that leverages the test-time scaling paradigm to enable autonomous driving systems to validate and refine trajectories without costly and heavy training. We construct a dedicated trajectory dataset based on the NAVSIM benchmark through condition-driven clustering and balanced sampling according to ego-vehicle states and navigation commands. Employing a dual-head architecture, DriveVer efficiently fuses candidate trajectories with multi-view visual representations and ego-vehicle kinematic features to simultaneously predict a safety confidence score and an absolute geometric refinement vector. Extensive experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark show that DriveVer significantly improves the performance of base planning models. Notably, as an extremely compact model with only 34M parameters, DriveVer introduces minimal computational overhead, achieving competitive results while maintaining real-time inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: DriveVer是一种轻量级即插即用的测试时验证器，利用测试时缩放范式以极低的计算开销（34M参数）对端到端自动驾驶轨迹进行安全置信度评分和几何细化，显著提升基座规划器在NAVSIM基准上的性能。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动驾驶模型在训练时缩放面临计算成本高昂和边际收益递减的问题，且现有规划器通常采用单次生成范式，缺乏对次优或不安全轨迹的二次验证与主动修正机制。
AI.method: DriveVer采用双头架构，结合候选轨迹与多视图视觉表示及车辆运动学特征，同时预测安全置信度分数和绝对几何细化向量；基于NAVSIM基准通过条件驱动聚类和基于自车状态与导航指令的平衡采样构建专用轨迹数据集。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM基准上的大量实验表明，DriveVer显著提升了基座规划模型的性能；作为仅有34M参数的极紧凑模型，引入极小的计算开销，在保持实时推理效率的同时取得了具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 测试时缩放范式能够以轻量级方式有效弥补端到端规划器缺乏二次验证的缺陷，实现在不依赖高成本训练扩展的情况下提升轨迹安全性与可靠性，为自动驾驶推理阶段优化提供了新方向。

title: What Survives Into Context: A Diagnostic for Budget-Constrained Multi-Hop RAG and When Submodular Evidence Packing Improves It
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) under a fixed reader-context budget forces a selection problem: of the evidence retrieved, only a fraction can be shown to the reader. We argue that document recall -- the standard retrieval metric -- is the wrong quantity to optimize in this regime, and we make two contributions. First, as a general contribution, we introduce answer-in-context, a diagnostic that measures whether a gold answer survives as a contiguous span in the packed reader context (not the retrieved set). It predicts answer F1 better than recall (r=0.39-0.55 vs. about 0.31), separates answer quality roughly five-fold (0.60 vs. 0.12 on HotpotQA), and carries information beyond retrieval: it adds Delta R squared=0.17 over recall and shows a 4.6x EM gap even among questions where all gold was retrieved. We also confirm it interventionally: on 2WikiMultiHopQA a packing change that raises coverage but not answer-in-context yields no accuracy gain. Second, as a conditional contribution, we cast reader-context construction as budgeted monotone submodular maximization and build a packer that jointly optimizes relevance, query coverage, representativeness, and diversity. On HotpotQA with a 160-token budget and a 3B reader it beats a strong focused heuristic, MMR, and naive packing -- by up to +5.1 F1 at equal-or-lower token cost, across three seeds. Crucially, we map the scope of this win honestly: it requires the conjunction of (i) multi-hop complementary structure, (ii) retrieval that surfaces the evidence, (iii) a binding but not extreme budget, and (iv) a reader weak enough that evidence density, not reading capacity, is the bottleneck. A quantization-controlled reader-scale ladder (3B to 7B to 14B) shows the edge over the heuristic is absorbed by 7B and significantly reverses by 14B, while the diagnostic explains every boundary with a single variable.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在固定阅读器上下文的RAG系统中，文档召回率是错误优化目标，提出answer-in-context诊断指标并设计基于预算单调子模最大化的打包器，在特定条件下可提升F1达5.1，但优势随模型规模增大而消失。
AI.motivation: 在固定阅读器上下文预算的RAG系统中，检索到的证据只有部分能被展示给阅读器，而传统评估指标——文档召回率忽略了上下文打包过程中的信息丢失，无法准确预测答案生成质量，因此需要更合适的诊断指标和优化策略。
AI.method: 本文提出answer-in-context诊断指标，用于衡量黄金答案是否作为连续片段出现在打包后的阅读器上下文中，并通过相关性分析、Delta R平方和干预实验验证其有效性；同时将阅读器上下文构建建模为预算约束下的单调子模最大化问题，设计打包器联合优化相关性、查询覆盖度、代表性和多样性。
AI.result: answer-in-context与答案F1的相关性（r=0.39-0.55）优于召回率（约0.31），在HotpotQA上将答案质量差距拉大至五倍（0.60 vs. 0.12），Delta R平方比召回率高0.17；在160 token预算、3B阅读器下，提出的打包器在HotpotQA上比MMR和朴素打包高出最多+5.1 F1；但读者规模升至7B时优势消失，14B时显著逆转。
AI.conclusion: answer-in-context是比召回率更优的RAG系统诊断指标，上下文打包优化仅在多跳互补结构、检索提供证据、预算紧约束且阅读器较弱时才有效，强阅读器可凭借自身推理能力弥补打包缺陷，弱阅读器则依赖证据密度。

title: AI Native Games: A Survey and Roadmap
summary: Generative AI now enables games to produce dialogue, quests, characters, images, and worlds at runtime. Yet generation alone does not make a game AI-native, nor does it guarantee playability. This paper defines AI-native games by whether runtime generative AI is constitutive of the core loop: if the AI component were removed or trivially replaced, the central form of play would collapse or become fundamentally different. This counterfactual criterion separates AI-native games from AI-augmented games, boundary artifacts, chatbots, tavern-style role-play, procedural content generation, and AI-assisted production. Using this definition, we screen candidate artifacts and analyze 53 publicly available AI-native games and prototypes. We introduce a dual-axis G/N taxonomy: the G-axis captures player-facing game type, while the N-axis captures the dominant AI mechanic that makes generative AI indispensable to play. The corpus is concentrated around language-forward designs, especially narrative adventure, epistemic interaction, and generative narrative, while categories such as semantic adjudication, multi-agent simulation, generative construction, and relationship/companion play remain less represented. We argue that the central design problem is organizing semantic openness into stable gameplay. AI-native design depends on mechanical invariants: goals, rules, state, feedback, pacing, and player agency that make open-ended AI outputs interpretable and consequential. We conclude with a roadmap for controllable generation, AI-as-mechanic design, multimodal and multi-agent systems, inference economics, evaluation, safety, and regulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AI原生游戏的定义标准——运行时生成式AI构成核心循环（若移除AI则游戏形态崩溃），并基于该标准筛选分析了53款游戏/原型，提出了G/N双轴分类法，论证了AI原生游戏设计的核心问题在于将语义开放性组织为稳定的可游玩机制。
AI.motivation: 现有游戏虽已利用生成式AI生成对话、任务、角色等内容，但"是否AI原生"缺乏明确定义，导致AI-native游戏与AI增强游戏、聊天机器人、程序化内容生成等边界模糊。本文旨在提出一个反事实判别标准，从核心玩法循环的构成性角度定义AI原生游戏，并系统分析现有作品以揭示其设计空间中的集中与空白区域。
AI.method: 本文提出反事实判别标准：若运行时生成式AI组件被移除或平凡替换后，核心玩法崩溃或根本性改变，则该游戏为AI原生。基于此标准筛选53款公开可用的AI原生游戏/原型，并引入G/N双轴分类法：G轴捕捉面向玩家的游戏类型，N轴捕捉使生成式AI对玩法不可或缺的主导AI机制。
AI.result: 语料集中在语言优先设计上，尤其是叙事冒险、认识交互和生成式叙事三类；而语义裁决、多智能体模拟、生成式建造、关系/同伴玩法等类别尚不充分。研究发现AI原生设计的核心问题是将语义开放性组织为稳定玩法，依赖机械不变量（目标、规则、状态、反馈、节奏、玩家能动性）来使开放式的AI输出可解释且产生实际影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文梳理了AI原生游戏的定义与分类，识别了设计空间中的集中与空白领域，指出核心挑战在于可控生成、AI即机制设计、多模态与多智能体系统、推理经济学、评估、安全与监管等方向，为后续研究提供了路线图。

title: The Illusion of High Utility in Safety Alignment of Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: Safety alignment of text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models aims to suppress harmful generations while preserving utility on benign prompts. Recent methods often appear to deliver high safety with high utility, but this conclusion rests largely on coarse global utility metrics (e.g., FID, CLIPScore) that are insensitive to fine-grained semantic correctness, creating an illusion of high utility. We show that when utility is measured with structured evaluation, this illusion breaks: on TIFA (Text-to-Image Faithfulness evaluation with Question Answering), safety-aligned models suffer substantial drops in semantic fidelity, including failures in object counts, attributes, and relationships. To diagnose the source of this gap, we analyze the text-encoder prompt embedding space and uncover semantic collapse, a contraction of embedding spread coupled with distortion of inter-prompt similarity structure, which strongly correlates with structured utility loss. Guided by this insight, we propose StructureAware Geometric Regularization (SAGE), a safety alignment objective that explicitly preserves embedding spread and inter-prompt relational structure during adaptation. Our method restores structured utility (TIFA +5.0% over prior state-of-the-art) while maintaining strong safety performance and competitive coarse-grained utility scores. Our source code and trained models are available at https://adeelyousaf.github.io/SAGE_ECCV26_Project_Page/.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了文本到图像扩散模型的安全对齐方法在粗粒度指标下看似保持高实用性，但实际上在结构化评估中会导致语义保真度显著下降；为解决该问题，论文分析了文本编码器提示嵌入空间中的语义坍缩现象，并提出了结构感知几何正则化（SAGE）方法，在保持安全性的同时恢复结构化实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全对齐方法在粗粒度全局指标（如FID、CLIPScore）上看似实现了高安全性与高实用性，但这些指标对细粒度语义正确性不敏感，导致对实用性的评估存在幻觉；论文旨在揭示并解决安全对齐后模型在结构化评估中语义保真度显著下降的问题。
AI.method: 论文首先通过TIFA（基于问答的文本到图像忠实度评估）进行结构化评估，揭示安全对齐导致的对象计数、属性和关系失败；接着分析文本编码器提示嵌入空间，发现语义坍缩现象（嵌入分布收缩与提示间相似性结构扭曲）；基于此洞察，提出结构感知几何正则化（SAGE），在安全对齐微调过程中显式保留嵌入的分布范围及提示间的相对结构关系。
AI.result: 所提SAGE方法在TIFA结构化评估上相比先前最先进方法提升了5.0%，同时保持了强安全性性能和具有竞争力的粗粒度指标分数，有效恢复了因安全对齐损失的结构化实用性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明安全对齐与结构化语义保真度之间存在本质权衡，而嵌入空间中的语义坍缩是导致此权衡的关键机制；通过几何正则化保留嵌入结构可在不牺牲安全性的前提下恢复细粒度语义正确性，为安全对齐方法的设计提供了新方向。

title: From Personas to Plot: Character-Grounded Multi-Agent Story Generation for Long-Form Narratives
summary: Although large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive creative fiction generation, they struggle to maintain narrative consistency and coherent plot lines in long-form stories. In this work, we introduce a unified framework for long-form narrative generation and verification. MAGNET, a multi-agent goal-driven narrative engine for storytelling, generates stories with persona-grounded character agents that propose actions based on a shared world state and evolving story goals, while ATLAS is a graph-based pipeline that compares scene-level world representations across a generated story to detect hallucinations. By evaluating MAGNET using an LLM editor, pairwise rubric scoring, and ATLAS, we show that our framework produces coherent narratives compared to single-model prompting and IBSEN. At 100 pages, MAGNET reduced annotations and hallucinations by 41 and 50%, respectively, compared to the single model baseline and by 34 and 45%, respectively, compared to IBSEN, with pairwise rubric evaluation showing similar results. These results suggest that long-form narratives can emerge from explicit world-state tracking and goal-driven multi-agent generation, providing a foundation for controllable and structurally coherent long-form narrative generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个由MAGNET（多智能体目标驱动叙事引擎）和ATLAS（基于图的幻觉检测管线）组成的统一框架，通过显式世界状态追踪和多智能体协作生成实现了长篇小说故事的一致性和连贯性，相比单模型和IBSEN在100页规模下分别降低了41%和34%的注释需求以及50%和45%的幻觉率。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在创意小说生成方面表现出色，但在长篇故事中难以维持叙事一致性和连贯的情节线索，现有方法缺乏对长期依赖关系和世界状态的显式建模。
AI.method: MAGNET是一个多智能体目标驱动叙事引擎，包含基于人物个性的角色智能体，根据共享的世界状态和不断演化的故事目标提出动作；ATLAS是一个基于图的管线，通过比较生成故事中场景级世界表示来检测幻觉。整体框架结合了显式世界状态追踪与目标驱动的多智能体协作生成。
AI.result: 在100页故事的生成中，MAGNET相比单模型基线减少了41%的注释需求和50%的幻觉率，相比IBSEN减少了34%的注释需求和45%的幻觉率；成对评分评估也显示了类似的结果。
AI.conclusion: 长篇叙事可以从显式的世界状态追踪和目标驱动的多智能体生成中涌现，这为可控且结构连贯的长篇故事生成提供了基础。

title: HARC: Coupling Harmfulness and Refusal Directions for Robust Safety Alignment
summary: Understanding how aligned LLMs internally represent safety is critical for diagnosing alignment vulnerabilities, as it explains why jailbreaks succeed and informs the design of robust alignment strategies. Prior work shows that aligned LLMs encode harmfulness and refusal as separable directions in the residual stream at prompt-side token positions. We show that jailbreaks succeed at prompt encoding by suppressing either the refusal or harmfulness direction before any token is generated, with distinct attack classes occupying separable regions of the harmfulness-refusal plane. Extending the analysis to response-token positions, we find that the model recognizes harmful content while it is generating that content, even when it failed to recognize the input as harmful at the prompt side. Motivated by our findings, we introduce HARC (Harmfulness-And-Refusal Coupling), a fine-tuning method that pairs the two directions across both prompt and response positions. Since the intervention is confined to the harmfulness-refusal subspace, it leaves the rest of the residual stream intact and does not degrade general capability or inflate over-refusal. Across extensive experiments, HARC achieves the strongest robustness-capability-usability trade-off among six baselines spanning the major training-time and inference-time safety methods. The harmfulness and refusal directions at prompt and response positions transfer across the five model families and two scales we tested without architecture-specific tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了越狱攻击通过抑制安全相关方向向量实现攻击，并提出HARC微调方法，通过耦合有害性与拒绝方向的双位置干预，在保持模型能力的同时实现最强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 已有工作发现对齐LLM在残差流中将有害性和拒绝编码为可分离的方向，但越狱攻击如何操纵这些方向以及如何基于此设计更鲁棒的安全对齐方法尚不清楚。
AI.method: 本文首先通过分析越狱攻击在提示端和响应端对有害性/拒绝方向的抑制效应，揭示攻击机制；进而提出HARC（Harmfulness-And-Refusal Coupling）微调方法，将有害性与拒绝方向在提示端和响应端进行耦合干预，且干预仅限于这两个方向所在的子空间，不破坏残差流的其余部分。
AI.result: 实验表明，不同越狱攻击在有害性-拒绝平面中占据可分离区域；模型在生成内容时能识别有害性（即使提示端未能识别）；HARC在六个基线方法中实现了最强的鲁棒性-能力-可用性权衡，且有害性与拒绝方向在五个模型家族和两种规模上可迁移，无需架构特定调优。
AI.conclusion: 越狱攻击通过抑制安全方向实现攻击，而HARC通过耦合双位置的安全方向干预，在残差流子空间内实现安全增强而不损害通用能力，为可迁移的安全对齐提供了新思路。

title: EO-VGGT: Orbital Ray-Conditioned 3D Foundation Models for Satellite Multi-View Reconstruction
comment: This article is submitted to journal and under review
summary: In the era of satellite constellations, multi-view optical satellite imagery is pivotal for Earth Observation (EO) and high-quality Digital Surface Model (DSM) reconstruction. Although feed-forward 3D foundation models have transformed computer vision, their deployment in satellite remote sensing is inherently constrained by the structural discrepancy between implicit perspective assumptions and explicit orbital pushbroom geometry. This geometric incongruity is further compounded by pronounced view-set heterogeneity. We present EO-VGGT, a framework that adapts a frozen perspective-driven model to orbital observations via explicit physical geometry embedding.First, the Geometry-Correlation Constrained Selection (GCCS) strategy prunes sub-optimal observations by balancing geometric diversity and radiometric consistency to optimize the input sequence. Second, a Sensor-Ray Encoder (SRE) parameterizes pixel-level pushbroom lines of sight derived from the Rational Function Model (RFM) into high-dimensional space-geometric tokens, reconciling the mathematical discrepancy between central projection and orbital kinematics. Third, a lightweight Ray-Pointing-Aware Adapter (RPAA) employs gated residual blocks to integrate these tokens directly into the frozen transformer backbone. Our findings underscore that integrating explicit physical geometry with optimized view selection is essential for robust feed-forward satellite 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: EO-VGGT通过显式物理几何嵌入和自适应视角选择，将冻结的前馈视角驱动3D基础模型适配到卫星推扫式几何观测中，解决了透视假设与轨道成像之间的结构不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 前馈3D基础模型在卫星遥感部署中受到隐式透视假设与显式轨道推扫式几何之间的结构差异所限制，这种几何不一致性被多视角卫星影像的强视角异质性进一步加剧，现有方法缺乏对视角选择优化和物理几何显式编码的系统性解决方案。
AI.method: EO-VGGT框架包含三大组件：(1) 几何-相关性约束选择(GCCS)策略，通过平衡几何多样性和辐射一致性来剪枝次优观测视角以优化输入序列；(2) 传感器射线编码器(SRE)，将基于有理函数模型(RFM)的像素级推扫式视线参数化为高维空间几何令牌，弥合中心投影与轨道运动学之间的数学差异；(3) 轻量级射线指向适配器(RPAA)，采用门控残差块将这些几何令牌直接注入冻结的Transformer主干网络。
AI.result: 研究发现，将显式物理几何与优化视角选择相结合对于鲁棒的前馈卫星3D重建至关重要，实验验证了该方法能够有效缓解透视-推扫几何不匹配带来的重建退化问题。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明，通过显式编码卫星传感器的物理成像几何并优化多视角输入的选择策略，可以成功地将预训练的透视驱动3D基础模型迁移到卫星遥感场景，为利用大规模预训练模型进行轨道3D重建提供了有效范式。

title: Towards Developing a Multimodal Chat Assistant for University Stakeholders: RAG-based Approach
comment: Accepted at 2025 28th International Conference on Computer and Information Technology (ICCIT)
summary: University stakeholders often face difficulties in accessing timely and reliable information, especially in developing countries, where there are very few intelligent support systems. Existing rule-based chatbots are unable to handle complex, domain-specific queries and are not well-equipped to adapt to evolving institutional policies. As a fill-in-the-gap solution, we present the multimodal university chatbot with retrieval-augmented generation. The system combines the large language model with semantic retrieval to produce context-based responses from institution-centric resources, such as the university handbook. The system accepts text and image queries through the vision-language model and applies quantized inference for rapid deployment on constrained hardware. A scalable backend built with FastAPI, adjoined with a responsive frontend developed with Next.js, ensures real-time usability. Our multimodal evaluation demonstrates that the system maintains strong satisfaction scores across both text and image queries, despite increased response time for visual inputs. Furthermore, quantitative evaluation shows that hallucination is reduced from 31.7% to 6.6% in our proposed RAG-based system, confirming the effectiveness of retrieval grounding.

AI.tldr: 提出了多模态大学聊天机器人，结合大语言模型、检索增强生成和视觉-语言模型，支持文本与图像查询，将幻觉率从31.7%降至6.6%，并在资源受限设备上实现高效部署。
AI.motivation: 发展中国家高校利益相关者难以获取及时可靠的信息，现有基于规则的聊天机器人无法处理复杂的领域特定查询，也难以适应不断变化的院校政策，缺乏智能化的支持系统。
AI.method: 系统采用检索增强生成架构，将大语言模型与语义检索相结合，从机构资源（如大学手册）中生成基于上下文的响应；通过视觉-语言模型支持文本和图像两种模态的查询输入，并应用量化推理实现受限硬件上的快速部署；后端基于FastAPI构建以实现可扩展性，前端采用Next.js确保实时可用性。
AI.result: 多模态评估显示，系统在文本和图像查询上均保持较高的满意度分数，但图像输入的响应时间有所增加；定量评估表明，所提出的RAG系统将幻觉率从31.7%显著降低至6.6%，验证了检索增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强生成技术能有效降低大语言模型在高校领域问答中的幻觉问题，多模态能力和量化推理使系统在真实场景中具备实用性与可部署性，为资源受限环境下的智能问答系统提供了可行的解决方案。

title: AGI Maze as a Benchmark Framework for World-Modeling Agents
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are powerful pattern-completion systems, but their default operating mode - predicting the next token from a static context - does not reliably produce persistent, manipulable representations of an external world. Many tasks that look like "reasoning" in text become substantially harder once the environment is partially observable, stateful, and requires memory and structured hypotheses about hidden state. AGI Maze is a lightweight framework for building such environments without requiring high-dimensional sensory inputs. It provides a family of grid-based maze tasks with a clean API and multiple difficulty regimes. The goal is to create benchmarks where agents must learn and use world state representations, not just infer a local rule over readily provided observations. We provide an initial evaluation of several vanilla LLMs on simple mazes showing that they fail to represent mazes internally at LLM inference time. We also introduce a baseline agent, which is allowed to use its message history as a working memory to construct descriptions of observations at agentic runtime. Although this can improve performance, it is still insufficient for an LLM agent to reliably solve even small mazes within a step budget that is more than enough for humans.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGI Maze框架，用于评估LLM在部分可观测、需要记忆和推理隐状态的环境中的表现，实验表明标准LLM在简单迷宫任务上内部表征能力不足，即使允许利用消息历史作为工作记忆，仍难以可靠求解。
AI.motivation: LLM的默认逐词元预测模式难以生成持久、可操作的对外部世界的表征，在部分可观测、需要记忆和对隐状态进行结构化假设的任务中表现大幅下降，现有基准缺乏对这类世界状态表征学习能力的评估。
AI.method: 设计了AGI Maze轻量级框架，提供一系列基于网格的迷宫任务和简洁API，包含多种难度级别；构建了需要智能体学习并使用世界状态表征的基准环境；引入允许利用消息历史作为工作记忆在智能体运行时构建观测描述的基线智能体。
AI.result: 初始评估表明，多个普通LLM在简单迷宫中无法在推理时内部表征迷宫结构；引入消息历史作为工作记忆的基线虽能提升性能，但仍不足以使LLM智能体在远多于人类所需的步数预算内可靠求解小规模迷宫。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在需要构建和维持世界状态表征的推理任务中存在根本性缺陷，仅靠扩展上下文记忆不足以解决此类问题，AGI Maze框架为评估和推动LLM的具身推理与状态表征能力提供了有效测试平台。

title: HyFL-CLIP: Hyperbolic Fine-Tuning of CLIP for Robust Long-Context Understanding
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://janeyeon.github.io/hyflclip
summary: CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) has become a de facto paradigm for image-text alignment, but it struggles with long-context descriptions (>77 tokens) due to absolute positional encoding and pretraining on short captions. In long contexts, sentences are often reordered, summarized, or partially omitted. Although prior works extend CLIP with longer positional encodings, they often suffer from degraded image-text alignment under such text perturbations. We attribute this limitation to the Euclidean contrastive objective, which enforces strict one-to-one matching and lacks explicit mechanisms for modeling hierarchical relationships between global context and its constituent elements. To address this issue, we propose HyFL-CLIP, a hyperbolic fine-tuning framework that distills the well-established text-image alignment learned in Euclidean CLIP into hyperbolic space via cross-manifold similarity distillation, leveraging its geometry to capture hierarchical and entailment relations. Our method models hierarchical semantics by linking summarized token-wise features, long-context descriptions, constituent short textual components, and images, capturing part-whole relationships via hyperbolic entailment with Einstein midpoint aggregation. Experiments on diverse benchmarks, including long-context cross-modal retrieval, cross-modal retrieval with caption perturbations, intra-modality retrieval, and short-text cross-modal retrieval, show that HyFL-CLIP achieves more robust long-context understanding. In particular, it yields up to 19.5% improvement in long-text cross-modal retrieval under textual perturbations over the best prior method. We also show HyFL-CLIP can be seamlessly integrated into other model frameworks by applying it to Stable Diffusion XL (SDXL).

AI.tldr: HyFL-CLIP 提出了一种双曲空间微调框架，通过跨流形相似度蒸馏将欧几里得 CLIP 的图像-文本对齐能力迁移至双曲空间，利用双曲几何的层次蕴含特性解决长文本描述中句子被重排序、摘要化或部分省略时图像-文本对齐退化的问题，并在长文本跨模态检索等任务上实现最高 19.5% 的性能提升。
AI.motivation: CLIP 因绝对位置编码和预训练数据以短描述为主，难以处理超过 77 个 token 的长上下文描述；在长上下文中，句子常被重排序、摘要化或部分省略，而现有扩展 CLIP 位置编码的方法在文本扰动下图像-文本对齐性能严重退化。作者将这一局限性归因于欧几里得对比目标强制严格的一对一匹配，缺乏建模全局上下文与其构成元素之间层次关系的显式机制。
AI.method: 提出 HyFL-CLIP，一种双曲空间微调框架，通过跨流形相似度蒸馏将欧几里得 CLIP 学到的文本-图像对齐能力迁移至双曲空间，利用双曲几何的层次蕴含特性捕获部分-整体关系。具体地，通过双曲蕴含关系（配合爱因斯坦中点聚合）将摘要化的 token 级特征、长上下文描述、构成性短文本组件以及图像之间的层级语义建模为层次结构。
AI.result: 在长上下文跨模态检索、带文本扰动的跨模态检索、模态内检索和短文本跨模态检索等多个基准上，HyFL-CLIP 均表现出更强的鲁棒长上下文理解能力；在文本扰动下的长文本跨模态检索中，相比最佳先前方法提升高达 19.5%。此外，该方法可无缝集成到其他模型框架（如应用于 Stable Diffusion XL）中。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间的层次蕴含几何特性能够有效建模长文本描述中全局上下文与局部成分之间的部分-整体关系，从而显著提升 CLIP 在长上下文和文本扰动下的鲁棒对齐能力；HyFL-CLIP 作为通用微调框架可兼容不同模型架构，具有良好的可迁移性。

title: $\text{Log}_\text{b}$Quant: Quantizing Language Models in Logarithmic Space
summary: Quantization has become an invaluable tool to reduce memory requirements and inference speed of modern language models, in particular to make them available for consumer setups and edge devices. While previous work has primarily focused on uniform quantization codebooks, such approaches are prone to suboptimal representations due to low-frequency high-magnitude weights. We introduce Log$_\text{b}$Quant, a novel logarithmic quantization approach with adjustable bases, to adapt to common parameter distributions. We show that our method exhibits superior performance at 4-bit precision on several performance benchmarks compared to asymmetric linear quantization at tensor-wise granularity, while achieving moderate speedup and high memory savings, making it suitable for private use on consumer-grade GPUs.

AI.tldr: Log_bQuant 提出了一种基于可调整底数的对数量化方法，在 4-bit 精度下相比非对称线性量化在性能基准上表现更优，同时实现了适度的加速和显著的内存节省，适用于消费级 GPU。
AI.motivation: 现有量化方法主要采用均匀量化码本，但由于语言模型权重中低频大幅值权重的存在，均匀量化容易产生次优表示，导致量化精度损失。因此需要一种能够更好适应权重分布特性的非均匀量化方案。
AI.method: 本文提出 Log_bQuant，一种基于可调整底数的对数量化方法。通过引入可学习的底数参数，使得量化码本能够自适应地匹配参数分布，从而在低位宽下更有效地表示模型权重。
AI.result: 在多个性能基准上，Log_bQuant 在 4-bit 精度下优于采用张量级粒度的非对称线性量化方法，同时实现了适度的推理速度提升和显著的内存节省，适合在消费级 GPU 上进行私有部署。
AI.conclusion: Log_bQuant 证明了可调整底数的对数量化在低位宽场景下相比均匀量化具有更好的表示效率，为在资源受限设备上高效部署大规模语言模型提供了一种实用的量化方案。

title: Self-GC: Self-Governing Context for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents accumulate tool results, files, plans, and user constraints that are too structured to be treated as a disposable text suffix. Current systems mostly rely on in-run heuristics such as chronological pruning and tool-output masking, or on final self-summary near a context limit. Heuristics are cheap but blind to future dependencies; summaries preserve narrative state but often hide exact evidence, locators, and editable artifacts. We present Self-GC, where GC denotes self-governing context while deliberately echoing garbage collection: the system does not merely reclaim unused tokens, but governs the lifecycle of agent context objects. Self-GC turns user turns, tool spans, and skill state into indexed objects; asks a side-channel planner to propose fold, mask, and prune actions; and lets the harness enforce recoverable sidecars, safe commit boundaries, and cache-aware commit. On a 33-session Hard Set, Self-GC prunes 43.95% of prefix tokens while leaving 84.85% of future continuations unaffected, compared with no-impact rates of 54.55% to 69.70% for heuristic baselines. On a 332-session production-derived suite, three planner backbones reach no-impact rates of 91.27% to 94.58%, while baselines remain at 77.71% to 87.46%. In production, an online account-level split reduces daytime average input tokens by 10% to 15%, with peak reductions near 20%. These results point to context management as runtime lifecycle control over indexed, recoverable objects rather than post hoc text cleanup.

AI.tldr: Self-GC 将 LLM 代理的上下文管理从后处理文本清理转变为对索引化、可恢复对象的运行时生命周期控制，通过侧信道规划器执行折叠、掩码和剪枝操作，在长上下文场景下实现高无影响率的令牌压缩。
AI.motivation: 长上下文 LLM 代理在执行过程中积累了大量结构化的工具结果、文件、计划和用户约束，现有系统仅依赖运行时的启发式策略（如按时间顺序剪枝、工具输出掩码）或上下文极限附近的自摘要，这些方法要么忽略未来依赖关系，要么在保留叙事连贯性时丢失精确证据和可编辑工件，缺乏对结构化上下文对象的细粒度生命周期管理。
AI.method: Self-GC 将用户轮次、工具跨度及技能状态转化为索引对象，通过一个侧信道规划器（planner）提出折叠（fold）、掩码（mask）和剪枝（prune）动作，并由执行框架（harness）强制执行可恢复的侧车（sidecar）机制、安全提交边界及缓存感知提交，从而实现对上下文对象的自管理生命周期控制。
AI.result: 在 33 个会话的 Hard Set 上，Self-GC 剪枝 43.95% 的前缀令牌，同时 84.85% 的未来延续不受影响，而启发式基线的无影响率为 54.55% 至 69.70%；在 332 个会话的生产级数据集上，三种规划器骨干达到 91.27% 至 94.58% 的无影响率，基线为 77.71% 至 87.46%；线上账户级拆分使白天平均输入令牌减少 10% 至 15%，峰值接近 20%。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，上下文管理的本质应是对索引化、可恢复对象的运行时生命周期控制，而非后处理文本清理；Self-GC 通过显式管理上下文对象的生命周期，在显著压缩令牌的同时保持对未来延续的高无影响率，为长上下文 LLM 代理的上下文管理提供了新的范式方向。

title: Information-Regularized Attention for Visual-Centric Reasoning
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have become a paradigm for multimodal learning, yet remain unstable due to object hallucination, weak visual grounding, and catastrophic forgetting after full-parameter instruction tuning. We claim these failures result from a lack of explicit control over visual representation learning during the standard next-token prediction objective. As a result, visual embeddings thus become passively optimized and prone to injecting redundant or spurious signals. To counter this, we introduce Information-Regularized Attention (IRA), a stochastic attention mechanism that explicitly regulates the amount of visual information injected into the hidden states of intermediate transformer layers. This local reparameterization translates uncertainty about visual representations into local noise that is independent across data points. Beyond evaluating model performance, we also quantify embedding properties, where IRA produces smoother curvature trajectories and suppresses attention-sink across all layers, indicating a more stable transformation of the visual signal. Our results suggest that stochastic attention is not merely a regularizer but a key contributor to representation learning in a generative architecture, offering a new direction for building more reliable VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出信息正则化注意力（IRA）机制，通过随机注意力显式调控视觉信息注入量，解决了VLM中的物体幻觉、视觉定位弱和灾难性遗忘问题，并证明随机注意力是生成式架构中表示学习的关键正则化器。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在多模态学习中虽然成为主流范式，但由于物体幻觉、视觉定位薄弱以及全参数指令微调后的灾难性遗忘等问题，其稳定性仍然不足。现有方法未能在标准的下一词预测目标中对视觉表示学习施加显式控制，导致视觉嵌入被被动优化，容易注入冗余或虚假信号。
AI.method: 提出信息正则化注意力（IRA），一种随机注意力机制，通过在Transformer中间层的隐藏状态中显式调控注入的视觉信息量。该机制将关于视觉表示的不确定性转化为独立于数据点的局部噪声，实现对视觉信号的局部重参数化控制。
AI.result: IRA不仅提升了模型性能，还从嵌入属性量化角度证明其产生了更平滑的曲率轨迹，并抑制了所有层中的注意力坍缩现象，表明视觉信号的变换更加稳定。
AI.conclusion: 随机注意力不仅是常规意义上的正则化手段，更是生成式架构中表示学习的关键组成部分，为构建更可靠的视觉-语言模型提供了新方向。

title: Distill to Detect: Exposing Stealth Biases in LLMs through Cartridge Distillation
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshops on TAIGR, AI4GOOD, Mechanistic Interpretability, and CoLoRAI
summary: Language models deployed in high-stakes roles can potentially favor certain entities, brands, or viewpoints, steering user decisions at scale. Such preferential biases can be introduced by any actor in the model's supply chain and are most dangerous when the model reveals its preference only on the relevant topic while behaving identically to its unmodified base on all other inputs. Recent work has shown that these biases can transfer through context distillation on semantically unrelated data, with the signal residing entirely in the soft logit distribution and remaining invisible to text-based inspection. However, the defender faces a fundamental asymmetry: without knowing the bias topic, no detection method can reliably surface a stealth preferential bias, regardless of whether it examines generated text, internal representations, or model weights. Here we introduce Distill to Detect (D2D), a method that surfaces hidden biases by distilling the distributional shift between a suspected model and its base into a cartridge (a KV-cache prefix adapter), concentrating the dominant divergence and amplifying the bias signal into generated text. We show that D2D successfully amplifies the hidden biases of stealth models to the extent that they can be reliably detected across multiple bias types. We also propose a theoretical framework that explains the efficacy of D2D through the lens of Fisher-weighted projection of the logit distribution shift, supported by empirical observations. By turning the capacity bottleneck of prefix-tuning adapters into a detection tool, D2D provides a practical building block for auditing hidden behaviors in deployed language models.

AI.tldr: 提出Distill to Detect (D2D)方法，通过将隐蔽模型与基座模型之间的logit分布偏移蒸馏到KV-cache前缀适配器（cartridge）中，放大并暴露隐蔽的偏好偏置，将其转化为可检测的文本信号，从而解决了防御方在未知偏置主题下无法可靠检测隐蔽偏置的不对称困境。
AI.motivation: 部署在高风险场景中的语言模型可能被供应链中的任意参与者植入对特定实体、品牌或观点的偏好偏置，这类偏置在无关输入上表现与基座模型一致，仅在相关主题上暴露偏好，且可通过上下文蒸馏在语义无关数据上传递，偏置信号仅存在于软logit分布中，对文本检查不可见。防御方面临根本性不对称：在不知道偏置主题的情况下，无论检查生成文本、内部表示还是模型权重，都无法可靠检测此类隐蔽偏好偏置。
AI.method: 提出Distill to Detect (D2D)方法，通过将疑似模型与基座模型之间的分布偏移蒸馏到一个cartridge（KV-cache前缀适配器）中，集中主导散度并将偏置信号放大到生成文本中。理论上通过Fisher加权投影（Fisher-weighted projection）视角解释logit分布偏移的蒸馏与放大机制，将前缀适配器的容量瓶颈转化为检测工具。
AI.result: D2D成功将隐蔽模型的隐藏偏置放大到可被可靠检测的程度，在多种偏置类型上均验证了有效性。实验表明，经过D2D处理后，原本在文本层面不可见的偏好偏置在生成文本中被显著放大，从而实现了可靠检测。
AI.conclusion: D2D通过将适配器的容量瓶颈反向利用为检测工具，为部署语言模型中隐蔽行为的审计提供了实用的构建模块。Fisher加权投影的理论框架有效解释了D2D的机理，并得到了实证支持，为未来检测隐蔽模型偏置的研究提供了理论基础和实践方向。

title: Self-Evolving Agents with Anytime-Valid Certificates
summary: Self-evolving agents violate the assumption behind most learning-theoretic guarantees: the data, evaluator, components, and hypothesis space are produced by the policy being updated. We present \textbf{SEA}, an architecture that confines self-modification to a small steering adapter and a versioned harness around a \emph{frozen} base model and admits each modification only through an anytime-valid gate that emits an auditable certificate against a fixed error budget. Five loop controllers compose published guarantees; because such gates can only \emph{select} among behaviors the frozen base already produces, five verifier-in-the-loop mechanisms -- best-of-$N$, micro-step search, self-authored reproduction oracles, search-layer control, and self-repair -- supply the dense, grader-free signal the gates require, computed from the issue text alone. On a $52$-instance SWE-bench Verified subset across four base models, base capability is the dominant, confound-free effect, and on two strong base models a deliberate no-op-composite control isolates the suite's contribution at $+4$ and $+5$ (\textsc{Glm}~5.2 $24\to28$; \textsc{Gpt} $29\to34$, the $65\%$ best), with event logs confirming that its mechanisms fire and prevent regressions. Results are single-run on expensive evaluations; confirming run-to-run variance and adapting the per-task algorithm mix are future work.

AI.tldr: 提出SEA架构，通过将自修改限制在冻结基础模型的小型适配器和版本化框架内，并配合任意有效门控机制发出可审计证书，在固定错误预算下实现可信的自我进化智能体，实验表明基础能力是主导因素，该套件在强基座上带来+4到+5的提升。
AI.motivation: 自我进化智能体违反了大多数学习理论保证的核心假设：数据、评估器、组件和假设空间都由正在更新的策略本身产生，这使得传统学习保证无法适用，亟需一种能够提供可审计安全性保障的自我修改架构。
AI.method: 提出SEA架构，将自修改限制在一个小型转向适配器（steering adapter）和一个围绕冻结基础模型的版本化框架（versioned harness）上，每次修改通过一个任意有效门控（anytime-valid gate）进行认证，该门控发出可审计证书并遵守固定错误预算；五个循环控制器组合了已有的理论保证，五种验证器在环机制（best-of-N、微步搜索、自我生成复制预言、搜索层控制和自我修复）从问题文本中提供门控所需的密集无评分信号。
AI.result: 在涵盖四个基础模型的52个实例SWE-bench Verified子集上，基础能力是主导且无混杂效应的因素；在两个强基础模型上，通过精心设计的无操作复合控制隔离出该套件的贡献为+4和+5（GLM 5.2: 24→28；GPT: 29→34，达到65%最优），事件日志确认机制被触发并阻止了性能退化。
AI.conclusion: SEA架构通过可审计的门控机制为自我进化智能体提供了理论保证框架，实验表明基础模型能力是性能的主要决定因素，而所提套件能带来稳健的提升并防止退化；未来工作需要确认运行间方差并自适应调整每任务算法组合。

title: StochasT: Learning with Stochastic Turn Depth for Visual Instruction Tuning
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page and code: https://yuanqing-ai.github.io/StochasT
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) rely extensively on Visual Instruction Tuning (VIT) to elicit their multimodal reasoning capabilities. However, we find a discrepancy: VIT often packs multiple language tasks about the same image for conversational, multi-turn training, whereas existing benchmarks evaluate LVLMs in isolated, single-turn scenarios. The models can suffer from visual attention decay and contextual overfitting during multi-turn training, making it hard for them to realize their full potential in the mismatched test phase.
